review_title: MMC Convert from Sage to QB Online
description: Overall expirience in using the service was great and prompt.
author: CPA Fidel O.
pros: The reports that come with the completion of conversion makes it easy to follow.
cons: Continuous update will always help. And sharing an SLA feedback once documents have been submitted
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Alison W.
pros: Instructions were easy to follow and communication from the team was excellent. You will not be left wondering what's going on!
cons: We had a very low number of transactions to import which made the process super easy and nothing to declare on where areas need improvement. Thankyou!
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: Initially were confident they could assist, made promises they couldnt keep and worse did not come clean and now left me with a massive clean up and still trying to work out how I can delete everything they did on the conversion (as I have already been using the new xero program) Cannot believe all of the other feedback that has been provided on this site. If they had just come clean and advised they were not able to do the MYOB to Xero conversion, it wouldve been ok.
author: kevin F.
pros: Initially advised could do the data migration
cons: Took 5-6 weeks longer to migrate than promised 7 days. (not all their fault as had some access issues with xero) Once finally done provided with a trial balance that was on an excel spreadsheet that looked as though it balanced with my P & L numbers. However when I tried to reconcile the data transfer, there was a large number of unreconciled transactions that just shouldnt be there. Amounts that didnt align with bank statements and then use of a 'rounding' option when amounts for the exact same item were not the same and then a 3c transaction to try and make it balance. A nightmare.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Transition was quick and communication was constant
description: MMCConvert essentially solved the hassle of moving years worth of financial data and records onto a new platform. Their customer service was extremely helpful and their team was in constant communication with updates throughout!
author: Syed A.
pros: Xero's ease of use is easily one of the most likeable parts of the software.
cons: The interchangeability of employees working across different sites could be made easier
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Fast & Efficient
author: James A.
pros: Easy to navigate through Xero Accounting Software.
cons: I have no complaints about Xero Accounting Software
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: [SENSITIVE CONTENT] was very good to deal with
author: John D.
pros: Bank feeds are most useful Data migration was a bonus feature
cons: Waiting to use QuickBooks Online while the data migration was happening
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Time and Quality data migration done by MMC
description: was migrating from QuickBooks desktop to QuickBooks online. and this process was fully handled by MMC Convert team without transferring this heavy job to the client.
author: Thapelo M.
pros: MMC Convert they were able to keep me up-to-date during all the process stage, they are very understanding and attend to clients emails on timely manner.Data was migrated as it is, without being tempered
cons: I would be lying as the services were amazing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very professional and very happy user experience
author: carryn S.
pros: Easy to use, and very friendly service from the consultants throughout the conversion process.
cons: The only negative we had was the time from import to use, lapse where you will need to reinput the gap between transfer and use of the new platform, it understandably takes time to ensure the data integrity is correct. But if you plan for the time which they do make you aware of at the start it is pretty seamless.

review_title: Fantastic Service and Very Fast & Efficient!
author: Suzanne C.
pros: I had a client looking to convert from Xero to QuickBooks Online. After realizing that the task was above my pay grade I found MMC Convert after searching online and was not disappointed! They had strong attention to detail, communicated throughout the duration of the project, completed the conversion in a timely manner, and the cost was very reasonable.
cons: I don't have any complaints. I have handled numerous conversions and this was, by far, the smoothest.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: MMC Makes Accounting Software Conversion Easy
description: Excellent team to deal with. They understanding conversions and get their clients back up and running very quick with all the history of past transactions.
author: Krysta F.
pros: MMC allows you to move to a new accounting software and bring your history with you. No one wants to lose their history and its painful to run reporting from multiple systems. I've been very happy with the way Ankit Mehta and the team has looking after us and our clients. They've done conversions across Quickbooks, Sage, Xero and Zoho for us so far.
cons: No complaints, in fact when I had made a mistake on one of our conversions MMC Convert fixed it even though it meant more work for them.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Very good - this is moy first convert and when I had a few questions - a Zoom Call resolved straight away
